message:
feat(policy): add quarantine registry and kill-switch primitives

Quarantine state machine (Quarantined → ProbationaryRelease → Clear)
with severity tiers (Advisory/Restricted/Isolated/Terminated),
graduated kill-switch semantics (SoftStop/HardStop/EmergencyHalt),
bounded audit log, telemetry, and 30 unit tests.

Precursor for ft-3681t.6.3 policy quarantine subsystem.

Bead: ft-2wp3b

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
